ddls:
CREATE TABLE "breweries" (
  "brewery_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brewery */,
  "brewery_name" TEXT /* Name of the brewery */,
  "street" TEXT /* Street address of the brewery */,
  "street2" TEXT /* Second line of the street address (if applicable) */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the brewery is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the brewery is located */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the brewery */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the brewery's website */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the brewery */,
  "hours" TEXT /* Operating hours of the brewery */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the brewery */,
  "founded" INTEGER /* Year the brewery was founded */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the brewery's logo */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* JSON array of social media links */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brewery_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "beers" (
  "beer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each beer */,
  "brewery_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brewery that produced the beer */,
  "beer_name" TEXT /* Name of the beer */,
  "style" TEXT /* Style of the beer (e.g., Milk / Sweet Stout, American Double / Imperial Stout) */,
  "abv" REAL /* Alcohol by volume (ABV) of the beer */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the beer based on user ratings */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the beer */,
  "ibu" REAL /* International Bitterness Units (IBU) of the beer */,
  "srm" INTEGER /* Standard Reference Method (SRM) for color of the beer */,
  "brew_date" TEXT /* Date the beer was brewed */,
  "brewery_batch_number" TEXT /* Batch number of the beer */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the beer's image */,
  "availability" TEXT /* Availability of the beer (e.g., year-round, seasonal, limited release) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("beer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_beers_brewery_id FOREIGN KEY ("brewery_id") REFERENCES breweries ("brewery_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "beer_styles" (
  "style_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each beer style */,
  "style_name" TEXT /* Name of the beer style */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the beer style */,
  "srm_range" TEXT /* Range of SRM values for the style */,
  "ibu_range" TEXT /* Range of IBU values for the style */,
  "abv_range" TEXT /* Range of ABV values for the style */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("style_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, brewery, user) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* User's bio or about section */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "beer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the beer being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user giving the rating */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user (out of 5) */,
  "review" TEXT /* Review written by the user (optional) */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date and time the rating was given */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the rating was last updated */,
  "is_anonymous" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the rating is anonymous */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_beer_id FOREIGN KEY ("beer_id") REFERENCES beers ("beer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "check_ins" (
  "check_in_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each check-in */,
  "brewery_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brewery where the check-in was made */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the check-in */,
  "check_in_date" TEXT /* Date when the check-in was made */,
  "check_in_time" TEXT /* Time of the check-in */,
  "beer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the beer being checked in */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given at the time of check-in (optional) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("check_in_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_check_ins_brewery_id FOREIGN KEY ("brewery_id") REFERENCES breweries ("brewery_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_check_ins_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_check_ins_beer_id FOREIGN KEY ("beer_id") REFERENCES beers ("beer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "beer_brewery_bridge" (
  "beer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the beer */,
  "brewery_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brewery */,
  "is_featured" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the beer is featured at the brewery */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("beer_id", "brewery_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_brewery_followers" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "brewery_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brewery */,
  "follow_date" TEXT /* Date and time the user started following the brewery */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "brewery_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "beer_style_bridge" (
  "beer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the beer */,
  "style_id" INTEGER /* ID of the style */,
  "is_primary" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the style is the primary style of the beer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("beer_id", "style_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON array of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
